author: kenzan100
description: Post word counts directly to Beeminder.

manifest.author: Yuta Miyama
manifest.description: This lets you post word counts directly from obsidian file to Beeminder.
manifest.name: Beeminder Word Count Plugin

name: Beeminder Word Count Plugin

releases.author: kenzan100
releases.description:
- Addresses the feedback from https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/pull/269#issuecomment-830850289
- Modal will now report the API failure.
- Support Japanese texts (for now, simply counts the length of texts).
releases.name: May 9th 2021

releases.author: kenzan100
releases.description:
bare minimum to make the following workflow possible:

1. Write in Obsidian md file.
2. Select the are you've just written.
3. Open command palette, select "Send word count to Beeminder".
4. It's contributed to the writing quota in Beeminder! 🎉
releases.name: initial release
